# School Emails Fixture

20 real school newsletter emails for parsing testing.

## Sources

- Seesaw (5)
- ClassDojo (5)
- ParentSquare (5)
- Direct school emails (5)

## Redaction Policy

- All student names replaced with synthetic names
- School names replaced with "Oakwood Elementary" etc.
- Addresses and phone numbers removed or replaced
- Dates preserved (important for parsing accuracy)

- [ ] TODO: Collect and anonymize 20 school emails (Phase 4 prerequisite)
